title: Neuro Embryology: A Systematic Approach
objectives: Understand the pathophysiology of Neuro Embryology
Identify key diagnostic features of Neuro Embryology
Apply clinical reasoning to Neuro Embryology management
Recognize common pitfalls in Neuro Embryology

sections.title: Overview of Neuro Embryology
sections.content:
**Neuro Embryology**



**Key Points:**
• Neural plate → neural folds → neural tube (primary neurulation, weeks 3-4)
• Neural crest cells migrate from neural folds → PNS, melanocytes, craniofacial, adrenal medulla
• Prosencephalon → telencephalon (cerebral hemispheres) + diencephalon (thalamus, hypothalamus)

sections.title: Pathophysiology & Key Features
sections.content:
• Neural plate → neural folds → neural tube (primary neurulation, weeks 3-4)
• Neural crest cells migrate from neural folds → PNS, melanocytes, craniofacial, adrenal medulla

sections.title: Diagnosis & Management
sections.content:
• Prosencephalon → telencephalon (cerebral hemispheres) + diencephalon (thalamus, hypothalamus)
• Mesencephalon → midbrain; Rhombencephalon → metencephalon (pons, cerebellum) + myelencephalon (medulla)
• Ventricles: lateral (telencephalon), 3rd (diencephalon), cerebral aqueduct (mesencephalon), 4th (rhombencephalon)

sections.title: Clinical Pearls
sections.content:
**High-Yield Points for Neuro Embryology:**

• Prosencephalon → telencephalon (cerebral hemispheres) + diencephalon (thalamus, hypothalamus)
• Mesencephalon → midbrain; Rhombencephalon → metencephalon (pons, cerebellum) + myelencephalon (medulla)
• Ventricles: lateral (telencephalon), 3rd (diencephalon), cerebral aqueduct (mesencephalon), 4th (rhombencephalon)

mcqs.question: Which of the following is MOST characteristic of Neuro Embryology?

options.text: Neural plate → neural folds → neural tube (primary neurulation, weeks 3-4)
options.explanation: Neural plate → neural folds → neural tube (primary neurulation, weeks 3-4)

options.text: Requires invasive testing in all cases

mcqs.question: What is the KEY diagnostic or management consideration for Neuro Embryology?

options.text: Immediate surgical intervention in all cases

mcqs.question: A patient presents with findings consistent with Neuro Embryology. Which finding would you expect?

options.text: Neural crest cells migrate from neural folds → PNS, melanocytes, craniofacial, adrenal medulla
options.explanation: Neural crest cells migrate from neural folds → PNS, melanocytes, craniofacial, adrenal medulla
